Name: Manga Makers Club
Long_Description: Learn manga-style character design, panels, and visual storytelling through guided activities, peer feedback, and sharing respectful, age-appropriate creations.

Name: Lego Builders Guild
Long_Description: Weekly themed builds (bridges, cities, habitats) with teamwork challenges, tidy-up routines, and safe construction guidelines for shared bricks.

Name: Minecraft Creative Club
Long_Description: Students design collaborative worlds focusing on creativity, problem-solving, and respectful online/offline behavior with teacher-approved content only.

Name: Anime Appreciation (Kids)
Long_Description: Focus on art styles, music, and storytelling techniques using curated, age-appropriate clips and discussions about themes like friendship and courage.

Name: Origami & Paper Arts
Long_Description: Create origami models and paper crafts for celebrations and service projects, practising patience, precision, and safe tool use.

Name: Gemstone & Geology Club
Long_Description: Learn geology basics, identify minerals safely, and create display cards while discussing respect for nature and scientific inquiry.

Name: Chess & Strategy Club
Long_Description: Develop strategic thinking through chess lessons, puzzles, mini-tournaments, and sportsmanship reflections.

Name: Coding for Kids
Long_Description: Build simple programs with block coding and beginner Python concepts, focusing on creativity, debugging, and responsible technology use.

Name: Robotics Rookies
Long_Description: Explore beginner robotics with supervised kits, teamwork roles, and safe handling routines for motors, tools, and batteries.

Name: Creative Writing Circle
Long_Description: Write and share short pieces in a supportive environment with mini-lessons on character, dialogue, and respectful feedback.

Name: Drama & Skits Club
Long_Description: Practise performance skills through short skits, improvisation, and staged readings with family-friendly themes and values.

Name: Choir Minis
Long_Description: Sing contemporary and traditional songs suitable for school events, learning harmony, breathing, and performance etiquette.

Name: Ukulele Beginners
Long_Description: Learn basic chords, rhythm patterns, and ensemble playing using school-friendly songs and steady practice routines.

Name: Art Studio Club
Long_Description: Explore multiple mediums (pencil, watercolour, collage) with guided projects, safe materials, and gallery-style sharing.

Name: Photography Basics
Long_Description: Learn composition and lighting with clear rules around privacy, consent, and respectful photography at school events only.

Name: Gardening & Growers
Long_Description: Grow herbs and flowers, learn composting basics, and support school beautification projects with safe tools and routines.

Name: Eco Helpers
Long_Description: Lead litter-free lunches, recycling education, and simple sustainability initiatives connected to stewardship and community service.

Name: Board Games Club
Long_Description: Play teacher-approved board games that develop cooperation, maths, and communication, with fair play and inclusive group norms.

Name: Puzzle & Brain Teasers
Long_Description: Weekly logic puzzles, riddles, escape-room-style challenges (non-scary), and teamwork problem-solving.

Name: Debate Starters
Long_Description: Learn basic debating, persuasive speaking, and respectful listening using age-appropriate topics and structured turn-taking.

Name: Public Speaking Club
Long_Description: Practise short talks, show-and-tell, and storytelling with supportive coaching on voice, posture, and clear structure.

Name: Craft & Clay Corner
Long_Description: Create simple clay and craft projects with safe materials, tidy work habits, and optional gifts for charity drives.

Name: STEM Challenge Crew
Long_Description: Build towers, test paper planes, design catapults (safe), and learn scientific thinking through fun, guided challenges.

Name: Math Games League
Long_Description: Play maths-based games and puzzles that strengthen number sense, patterns, and problem-solving in teams.

Name: Science Explorers
Long_Description: Do hands-on science activities using safe household materials, lab safety routines, and explanation writing for learning journals.

Name: History Detectives
Long_Description: Use maps, artifacts (replicas), and stories to explore history with critical questions and respectful discussion.

Name: Geography & Maps
Long_Description: Learn mapping skills, flags, landforms, and cultural appreciation through games and respectful presentations.

Name: Language & Culture Club
Short_Description: Learn words from around the world
Long_Description: Try beginner phrases in multiple languages and celebrate cultures through games, music, and respectful curiosity.
